title: insight trajectory
summary: The development thread focuses on the management of stated-plan documents in a project, with key decisions including the declaration of a tier-3 register, the enumeration of eight documents, and the handling of boundary rules. The main outcomes involve the integration of these documents into the roadmap, with observations flagged for insight-emergent-properties. The thread also highlights the absence of a clear trajectory for certain versions and the importance of maintaining a consistent back-reference architecture for cross-document readability.
